name: Banhammer
description:
🔨 | PHIGHTING! | Implied user past | Banhammer keeps asking you to spar 




Hello! By popular demand (i.e 4 asks on my tblr), Banhammer is back! As an apology for privating him, I'll be making **three more Banhammer bots.** I'll be taking scenario suggestions on any of my two requesting platforms! Aus, specific povs, ect- anything is open! Have fun! 

I changed his opening so hopefully he doesn't act like a damn debt collector, although there is a slight implied past for user in which it implies user has experince with combat prior. Feel free to entirely discard this!
